GYEON PPF Slip

Brand: Gyeon

Sizes: 1L, 4L
Barcode (1L): 8809432677857
Barcode (4L): 8809432677864

Concentrated PPF installation slip solution

Q²M PPF SLIP is GYEON's newest addition to our dedicated PPF line-up. It comes as a slip solution designed specifically to work hand in hand with GYEON Paint Protection Film.

Its high concentration allows it to be diluted up to 1:100.

EFFICIENT: Q²M PPF SLIP has been designed with efficiency and economical aspect for first time user of PPF and major protection services studio. Thanks to its high concentration 1:100, installer can adjust solution easily to their specific environement and slip preferences with minimal impact on their day to day operation cost.

UNIQUE: We used a small addition of ethyl alcohol to speed up the evaporation and gently activate the adhesive, allowing a quick and efficient install on complex-shaped panels. At the same time, it improves the look of the film shortly after installation.

Key Benefits:
- Pure slip solution
- Highly concentrated
- Quick evaporation time

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q2M PPF Slip - The Microfiber Shop
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q2M PPF Slip

Concentrated Installation Fluid for PPF (1000ml)

Price: Rs. 1,749.00

Q2M PPF Slip is a highly concentrated installation fluid developed for seamless paint protection film (PPF) application. Engineered to work perfectly with all GYEON PPFs—and fully compatible with other brands—it ensures smooth slip, precise positioning, and efficient film adhesion on even the most complex panels.

Key Features:
- High Concentration – Dilutes up to 1:100 for maximum efficiency.
- Customizable Slip – Adjust dilution to match environmental conditions and installer preference.
- Adhesive Activation – Contains ethyl alcohol for quicker evaporation and better bonding.
- Complex Panel Friendly – Ideal for curved, tight, and intricate areas.
- Professional & Cost-Effective – Designed for both first-time users and detailing studios.

Highlights:
- Ensures smooth film movement for easy positioning.
- Economical—one 1000ml bottle makes up to 100 liters of solution.
- Helps improve film's appearance shortly after installation.
- Reduces risk of bubbles, silvering, and adhesive marks.
- Safe for all types of PPF materials.

Areas of Application:
- Paint protection film (PPF) installation
- Vinyl wrap application
- Complex panels such as bumpers, hoods, mirrors, and trims
- Professional detailing shops and DIY installations

Warnings & Safety Tips:
- Always dilute properly (up to 1:100) before use.
- Do not apply on hot surfaces or under direct sunlight.
- Shake well before use and test dilution ratio as per conditions.
- Store in a cool, dry place away from frost and heat.
- Keep out of reach of children.

Pro Tip: Adjust the dilution ratio to balance slip and tack for your working conditions. On complex-shaped panels, Q2M PPF Slip ensures faster installation, improved finish, and better adhesive activation.

Customer Reviews: No reviews yet.

Images:
- https://themicrofibershop.com/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Q2M_PPF_Lift.jpg
- https://themicrofibershop.com/cdn/shop/files/PPFSlip.jpg

Lubricant for the application of PPF films Gyeon Q2M PPF Slip (4 l)

Catalog number: G38815
Brand: Gyeon
Price: 81,90 EUR (4 liters) / 26,90 EUR (1 liter)
Stock: 4L - Temporarily unavailable / 1L - In stock (58 pcs)

Concentrated PPF lubricant intended for the placement and application of PPF foils.

Description:
The Q²M PPF Slip is the latest addition to the specialized PPF Gyeon range. It comes as the ultimate solution designed specifically to work hand-in-hand with Gyeon's protective PPF films. Of course, you can use it with any other film on the market. Its high concentration allows dilution up to 1:100. Just add 10 to 15 ml to one liter of demineralized (distilled) water and you will get a sufficient amount of lube solution ready for immediate use. If necessary, you can adjust the ratio according to your personal preferences.

Main Features:
- High viscosity, rapid evaporation.
- PPF lubricant.
- Removes haze and stains.
- Easy wiping.
- Concentrate.

How to Use:
- Dilute PPF Slip 1:100 with distilled water.
- Shake well.
- Spray liberally on both the PPF and the installation surface.
- Continue installing the film.
- Lubricate continuously if necessary.

About the Brand:
The Gyeon brand (pronounced "jion") comes from South Korea, where several global brands dealing with high-quality and innovative car cosmetics were created. South Koreans are known to be very precise and hardworking, and these qualities are perfectly reflected in the products of this brand. This car cosmetic offers advanced technologies at competitive prices. Gyeon develops and manufactures almost every product in its own laboratory and factory in South Korea with the help of the best scientists and experts in the field of car care. They support this process with in-depth research, intensive testing and an obsessive desire to improve everything they do. This approach results in exceptional products in terms of quality, durability and ease of use.

Rating: 100% (1 customer rated - 5 stars)

Gyeon Q2M PPF Slip Lubricant for PPF film application (4 l)

Code: 8189
Brand: GYEON
EAN: 8809432677864
Price: €82,47
Stock: In stock (>5 pcs)

Description:
Gyeon Q²M PPF Slip is the newest addition to the Gyeon product line designed for PPF films. It was developed to be compatible with all PPF films from Gyeon as well as other manufacturers. Q²M PPF Slip has a very high concentration, allowing dilution up to a ratio of 1:100. Q²M PPF Slip was designed with efficiency and economy in mind for detailing studios. Thanks to its high concentration (1:100), installation technicians can easily adjust the solution to their specific environment and glide preferences with minimal impact on their daily operating costs. Gyeon added a small amount of ethyl alcohol to speed up evaporation and gently activate the adhesive, enabling quick and efficient installation of PPF film on complex-shaped panels. At the same time, it improves the appearance of the film shortly after installation.

Main Features:
- Lubricant for PPF film application.
- Highly concentrated – 1:100.
- High viscosity and fast evaporation thanks to the use of ethyl alcohol.
- Highly economical – reduces operating costs for detailing centers.
- Includes a practical dispenser.

How to Use:
- Dilute Gyeon Q²M PPF Slip at a ratio of 1:100 with distilled water.
- Shake well.
- Spray generously onto the PPF film and the installation surface.
- Continue with the film installation.
- If necessary, lubricate continuously during installation.

About the Brand:
The Gyeon brand originates from South Korea, home to many world-renowned brands specializing in high-quality and innovative car care products. South Koreans are known for their precision and hard work, qualities perfectly reflected in this brand's products. Gyeon develops and manufactures almost every product in its own laboratories and factories in South Korea, with the help of the best scientists and experts in automotive care. This process is supported by in-depth research, intensive testing, and an obsessive drive to improve everything they do. The result is exceptional products in terms of quality, durability, and ease of use. Today, Gyeon products are sold on six continents and in over 100 countries worldwide.

GYEON Q²M PPF Slip 1000ml

Brand: GYEON
SKU: 8809432677857
Price: €25,90
Stock: 18 in stock, ready to ship
Capacity: 1000 ML

CONCENTRATED INSTALLATION FLUID FOR ALL TYPES OF PPF

Q²M PPF SLIP is the newest addition to our PPF-dedicated product line-up. It has been designed to match all GYEON PPF's, but can also be easily utilised with other materials. Q²M PPF Slip has a very high concentration, allowing it to be diluted up to 1:100.

EFFICIENT:
Q²M PPF SLIP has been designed with efficiency and economical aspect for first time user of PPF and major protection services studio. Thanks to its high concentration 1:100, installer can adjust solution easily to their specific environement and slip preferences with minimal impact on their day to day operation cost.

UNIQUE:
We used a small addition of ethyl alcohol to speed up the evaporation and gently activate the adhesive, allowing a quick and efficient install on complex-shaped panels. At the same time, it improves the look of the film shortly after installation.

Images:
- https://autojoy.shop/cdn/shop/files/GYEON-Q_M-PPF-Slip-1000ml-GYEON-125912151.png

Q²M PPF SLIP

Exterior / Preparation

Dedicated installation lubricant for PPF.

Q²M PPF Slip is a specialized lubricant developed to support precise installation of paint protection film and vinyl wraps. It provides controlled slip during positioning, allowing installers to move, align and adjust the film accurately without premature bonding.

Capacities: 1000 ML / 4000 ML

Concentrated installation fluid for all types of PPF:
Q²M PPF Slip improves installation efficiency by balancing glide and control. It helps reduce tension during film placement, minimises the risk of stretch marks and allows smooth positioning before final fixation. The formula is designed to work consistently during professional PPF applications.

Key Benefits:
- Pure slip solution
- Highly concentrated
- Quick evaporation time

How to Use:
1. Dilute Q²M PPF Slip according to installer preference.
2. Spray onto the adhesive side of the film and the surface.
3. Position and align the film as required.
4. Squeegee excess solution from beneath the film.
5. Proceed with final fixation once alignment is complete.

Frequently Asked Questions:
Q: What is Q²M PPF Slip used for?
A: It is used as a lubricant during PPF installation.

Q: Does it affect adhesive bonding?
A: No. It allows positioning before final adhesion.

Q: Is it suitable for all PPF?
A: Yes. It is designed for modern automotive films.

Q: Can dilution be adjusted?
A: Yes. Dilution can be adjusted depending on working conditions.

Q: Is it intended for professional use?
A: Yes. It is designed for installers and wrapping specialists.
